role: Styles the board-view modal overlay shell (scrim, panel, header, scrollable body, message states, and DNA board-group framing overrides).
capabilities: Board overlay modal chrome (open/closed states, scrim, panel)
Header layout with title, subtitle, and close button
Scrollable body with safe-area bottom padding
Empty/error/quiet message and retry button styling
Override DNA .screen fixed phone-frame and .ar-responsive grid for grouped-list layout
substance_why: Implements a complete modal surface with detailed responsive/DNA integration overrides and extensive design rationale in comments.
interactions_present: Pointer-event toggling between open and closed overlay
Styled close button (cursor pointer, 44x44 touch target)
interactions_missing: No wired close action for the close button or scrim click
No wired retry action for the retry button
performance_risks: Transition on visibility is discrete and may cause a perceptual jump alongside opacity
Fixed overlay/scrim creates a full-viewport stacking context
reuse_why: Keep the token-based layout intent and DNA override rules, but rebuild selectors and structure to match the redesigned component surface.
decomposition_hints: Separate overlay chrome (overlay, scrim, panel, head, close) from content framing (.board-groups overrides)
Split DNA integration overrides into a dedicated host-overrides stylesheet
Extract message states and retry button into reusable empty/error components
Co-locate animation/transition tokens with other overlay surfaces
